CustomField.description: Enter the total Security Deposit amount received from the previous lessor during novation. This value will be used to calculate SD invoiced and paid amounts if no invoices or payments exist.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Enter the total Security Deposit amount received from the previous lessor during novation. This value will be used to calculate SD invoiced and paid amounts if no invoices or payments exist.
CustomField.label: Manual SD Transfer Amount
